name: AK-12
in_game_description: Jack-of-all trades gun with a unique burst-fire mode that increases the weapon's power significantly if you can use it right. Model submitted by Rialag.
overview:
Weapon Class: Assault Rifle
Rank Required: 0
Damage dealt on head: 46.2→29.4; On torso: 33→21; On limb: 33→21
Velocity: 2,950 studs/sec
Range: 70→160
Magazine: 30+1
Fire Rate: 700 RPM A & S | 1000 RPM 3x B
